bundles.title: Checkout timeout / retry amplification
bundles.trace_posture: Bounded TRACE packet narrows the timeout guard and retry middleware path
bundles.proof: Shows that NEXUS can turn gateway timeout logs into one routed case, a bounded REPLICA replay, and a mitigation ladder that still stays governed.
bundles.expected_path: SENTINEL → PRISM → REPLICA → TRACE → FORGE → GUARDIAN
bundles.next_step: Watch the runtime comparison first, then inspect TRACE's timeout checkpoints before reviewing Guardian's decision.

bundles.title: DB pool exhaustion / session leak
bundles.family: Checkout DB pool exhaustion / session leak
bundles.trace_posture: Bounded TRACE packet narrows the checkout session scope and release path
bundles.proof: Shows that NEXUS can connect database saturation logs to one bounded runtime replay and a developer handoff that points at the session-release path.
bundles.expected_path: SENTINEL → PRISM → REPLICA → TRACE → FORGE → GUARDIAN
bundles.next_step: Look at the runtime comparison and the session-release debugging path before you review the selected mitigation.

bundles.title: Deploy regression / 5xx spike
bundles.runtime_posture: Runtime-backed via the bounded catalog rollback pack
bundles.trace_posture: Bounded TRACE packet narrows the rollback candidate and affected release boundary
bundles.proof: Shows that NEXUS can connect a noisy release incident to a reversible rollback-oriented mitigation rather than forcing a generic escalation.
bundles.expected_path: SENTINEL → PRISM → REPLICA → TRACE → FORGE → GUARDIAN
bundles.next_step: Check the release-change clues, then look at the rollback packet and Guardian's rollback posture.

bundles.title: Queue / worker backlog affecting transaction completion

bundles.proof: Shows that NEXUS can route queue-pressure logs into one clear ownership and recovery story instead of leaving support to guess between app and infrastructure teams.
bundles.expected_path: SENTINEL → PRISM → REPLICA → TRACE → FORGE → GUARDIAN
bundles.next_step: Check whether support coverage stayed runtime-backed or inference-first, then inspect the queue backlog handoff packet.
